en: Hello guys and welcome to Neka Native English for Kids and Adults.
Well today I'm bringing you another amazing English expression.
And the expression for today is can't believe my eyes.
Can't believe my eyes simply means to be amazed or shocked by what you see.
As in I can't believe I saw he did that.
I can't believe my eyes that he did that with the bicycle.
Or I can't believe my eyes that he did that great move with the bicycle.
I think he had some great skills.
So thank you so much for watching and I'll see you in the next one.
